title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at ECIL Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at ECIL Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
ECIL Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
